videos.title: JavaScript Local Storage - What It Is and How to Use It
videos.description: A comprehensive tutorial on Local Storage covering setItem, getItem, removeItem, clear, and practical examples including a TODO app implementation.

videos.title: LocalStorage and SessionStorage Explained
videos.description: Clear explanation of the differences between Local Storage and Session Storage with practical code examples and common use cases.

videos.title: Learn HTML5 Local Storage - Build a Notes App
videos.description: Build a complete notes application from scratch using Local Storage, covering CRUD operations, JSON serialization, and best practices.

videos.title: JavaScript Cookies vs Local Storage vs Session Storage
videos.description: Comparison of the three client-side storage options, explaining when to use each one and their respective limitations.

videos.title: Local Storage Crash Course in JavaScript
videos.description: A crash course on Local Storage covering the full API, storing complex data types, and building a mini project.
